The '''Battle of Halbara''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] strike against a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] convoy carrying [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] and supplies headed for the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

==The battle==
The battle erupted when a spearhead force of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] entered the staging area of the Rebel convoy. [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadrons]] immediately moved to intercept, but could not prevent a few torpedoes being launched at the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]]. While both fighter groups were engaging the Assault Gunboats, the frigates ''Damocles'' and ''Lightning'' appeared in the systems and deployed [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], putting tremendous pressure on the Rebel starfighter groups.

However, the skill of Rebel pilots prevailed and the entire starfighter complements of the frigates as well as all Assault Gunboats were eventually destroyed. The Rebel fighter squadrons then moved to engage the frigates, providing targets for the Imperial gunners and distracting them from the convoy. While the [[Cargo ferry|cargo ferries]] and [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvettes]] jumped to the safety of hyperspace, Rogue Squadron forced the ''Damocles'' and the ''Lightning'' to withdraw or be destroyed. When the [[Gallant (escort carrier)|''Gallant'']] jumped, the remaining Rogue and Gold starfighters quickly followed.

==Aftermath==
The Rebel Alliance in the Airam sector had received a full shipment of B-wing starfighters with this convoy. They proceeded to replace some of the aging [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] from [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadron]] with the newer B-wings, which proved a valuable asset to the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] task force operating in the area. The new bombers would be put to use in the [[attack on the Gelgelar system]] for the first time in the [[Balance of Power in the Airam Sector|campaign]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
